vulnerability.title: Ensure gnutls-utils is installed
vulnerability.description: The gnutls-utils package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install gnutls-utils
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: if ! rpm -q --quiet "gnutls-utils" ; then dnf install -y "gnutls-utils" fi

triage_decision.reason: This finding involves installing a standard package (gnutls-utils) that provides cryptographic utilities. The remediation is a simple package installation via dnf, which is a routine operation that does not affect authentication, authorization, networking, filesystems, or require a reboot. The risk of system breakage or lockout is minimal.
